message:
feat(cli): Implement ms setup command for zero-config agent integration

Implements meta_skill-u9xe: Implement ms setup command

- Add `ms setup` command with comprehensive options:
  - `--detect-only`: Show detected agents without configuring
  - `--status`: Show current integration status
  - `--dry-run`: Preview actions without changes
  - `--completions`: Generate shell completions only
  - `--uninstall`: Remove ms integrations
  - Agent-specific flags (--claude-code, --codex, etc.)

- Setup actions include:
  - Generate SKILL.md for AI agent discovery
  - Install shell completions (bash, zsh, fish)
  - Install pre-commit hook for ms validation
  - Agent-specific MCP server configuration

- Add SetupAction, SetupReport, SetupSummary types
- Export DetectionSummary from agent_detection module
- Add 10 unit tests for setup functionality

Builds on agent detection module from meta_skill-ql37

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
